### gblup_predict

>  gblup_predict (pop:chewc.population.Population, h2:float=0.5,
>                     trait_idx:int=0)

\*Perform GBLUP prediction, correctly handling a mix of individuals with
and without phenotypes for model training and prediction.

Args: pop: Population object. Can contain individuals with phenotypes
(training set) and individuals with NaN phenotypes (prediction set). h2:
Heritability. trait_idx: Index of the trait to predict.

Returns: PredictionResults object with EBVs for ALL individuals.\*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a href="https://github.com/cjGO/chewc/blob/main/chewc/predict.py#L47"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### gblup_predict_improved

>  gblup_predict_improved (pop:chewc.population.Population, h2:float=0.5,
>                              trait_idx:int=0)

\*Perform GBLUP prediction using a single, unified Mixed Model Equation
solve for all individuals. This approach is more efficient and
JAX-friendly.

Args: pop: Population object. Can contain individuals with phenotypes
(training set) and individuals with NaN phenotypes (prediction set). h2:
Heritability. trait_idx: Index of the trait to predict.

Returns: PredictionResults object with EBVs for ALL individuals.\*
